steps: Given user is on dashboard|When user clicks on CST menu|Then CST page should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to CST page

steps: Given user is on CST page|When user clicks on New Training button|Then Child Safety Training Order step-1 page should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to CST step-1 page

steps: Given user is on Child safety training Order step-1 page|When user clicks on +Applicant button|Then adding new applicant fields should be displayed
expected_result: To add new applicant fields should be displayed

steps: Given user is on Step-1 form page|When user enters first name as AI|And user enters last name as Patel|And user enters email as nidhi.patel+946@ministrybrands.com|And user clicks Next button|Then Step-2 page should be displayed
expected_result: User should be allowed to enter the information

steps: Given user is on Step-2 form page|When user selects child safety training as Employee|And selects child safety training email template as Test Email|And user clicks Next button|Then Step-3 page should be displayed

steps: Given user is on Step-3 form page|When user is on review page review all information entered in step -1 and step-2|And scroll the Child safety course disclaimer section|And tick the checkbox|And click the button Send Invites|Then order submission should be successful

steps: Given order is successfully submitted|When user clicks Done button|Then user should be redirected to Background Check dashboard
